prestazioni: Engine swap to a Hyundai-Kia Lambda II 3.8L GDI V6 (G6DJ) with forged internals (JE Pistons 9.5:1 compression, Manley H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings) and a custom Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (1.06 A/R turbine housing, 0.82 A/R compressor housing) running 18 psi on E85 fuel, paired with a PTP Turbo Smart 45mm wastegate and a Tial MV-R 50mm blow-off valve. Supporting mods include a Kelford 272/280-degree camshaft set, Ferrea titanium intake/exhaust valves, and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust with a MagnaFlow 304 stainless steel muffler (part #14855).

Full bolt-on fuel system upgrade featuring a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup (part #20-0119), a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump (part #F90000267), and a set of Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors (part #ID1050XDS) calibrated via a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with custom lambda-based closed-loop tuning. The cooling system is upgraded with a Mishimoto aluminum radiator (part #MMRAD-KIA-06) and a Setrab 50-row oil cooler (part #50-34150).

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (part #KIA04-RT) featuring 8-position adjustable damping, Swift Springs (8K front/7K rear rates), and spherical bearing top mounts. Chassis reinforcement includes a Cusco front strut tower bar (part #637 540 A) and a Whiteline rear subframe brace (part #KBR95). Braking is upgraded with a StopTech Trophy BBK (355mm front/345mm rear, part #83.091.6004) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody conversion kit (part #LB-KIA-CADENZA) with custom carbon fiber fender flares, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts, finished in a 3-stage pearl white with a custom candy red pinstripe. The kit includes a functional carbon fiber hood with a central vent and a custom rear diffuser with integrated quad exhaust tips (2.5-inch diameter, titanium-coated).

Custom 3D-printed front splitter and rear wing (designed in-house, CNC-machined from 5mm aluminum) with adjustable angle of attack (0-15 degrees) and integrated LED turn signals. The splitter features a removable Gurney flap and is supported by a pair of carbon fiber canards (Seibon Carbon, part #KIA-CAD-01). Wheels are Work Emotion CR Kiwami (19x10.5 +25 front, 19x11.5 +35 rear) with a custom bronze finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (265/30/19 front, 295/25/19 rear).

Interior overhaul featuring a full Alcantara retrim (Rosen Europe, custom pattern) with red stitching, including the dashboard, door cards, and headliner. Seats are replaced with Recaro Pole Position buckets (part #381 200 50) mounted on custom Bride Low Max rails (part #BR-100LM). The steering wheel is a NRG Innovations 350mm deep-dish (part #NRG-501-350-DP) with a custom KIA emblem in the center, paired with a quick-release hub (NRG part #NRG-202). The roll cage is a custom 8-point bolt-in unit by Custom Cages (part #KIA-CAD-01) with a harness bar and integrated fire suppression system (Sparco part #00777100S).
